top_signals.title: This Wouldn’t Be Much of a Rally Without AI Stocks
top_signals.summary: Equal-weighted S&P 500 is unchanged since war broke out.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sri Lankan Rupee Rallies Most in Three Years, Leads Asia FX
top_signals.summary: The Sri Lankan rupee surged against the dollar, snapping a nine-day losing streak to become Asia’s best-performing currency on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: The $4.50 Gas Economy: Fewer Nights Out, More Belt-Tightening
top_signals.summary: Higher prices at the pump are making Avarisse Crawford rethink her spending. The 33-year-old has started scaling back her “fun budget,” meaning fewer steak dinners and happy hours with coworkers — instead she’s seeking out free activities, like going to the park.

top_signals.title: At Singapore International Festival of Arts, theater spills into everyday life
top_signals.summary: Tze Chien Chong, the new director of Singapore International Festival of Arts. strives to attract a broader audience to Singapore's oldest festival for performing arts.

top_signals.title: Critical Metals secures 15-year offtake from REalloys
top_signals.summary: The agreement builds on the initial letter of intent for a 10-year commitment that the parties signed in October.
